name: teams-domain-store
description: Create TeamsDomain ArkType scope with Organization, Team, App, Membership, Invitation entities. Implement createTeamsStore() factory using createStoreFromScope with three enhancement hooks: enhanceModels (Invitation.isExpired, Membership.level), enhanceCollections (findByUserId, findForResource), enhanceRootStore (resolvePermissions, createInvitation, acceptInvitation).
rationale: Domain store pattern from auth. Enhancement hooks provide computed views and domain actions.
